faq.title: Questions clients ask us
faq.q1: How quickly can I get a consultation?
faq.a1: We typically respond within 24 hours. Urgent matters are prioritized same-day when possible.
faq.q2: What should I bring to the first meeting?
faq.a2: Bring any court orders, agreements, notices, or documents related to your matter. A brief written summary helps us prepare.
faq.q3: Do you handle cases outside Prayagraj?
faq.a3: Yes. We represent clients across Uttar Pradesh and India, with strong High Court and district court practice.
faq.a4: We provide transparent fee estimates after understanding your matter — fixed fees, retainers, or stage-wise billing as appropriate.
faq.a5: Absolutely. All communications are protected by attorney-client privilege.

cta.title: Your matter deserves clarity — not confusion
cta.subtitle: Book a confidential consultation. We'll map your options before costs escalate.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: From first brief to final order — modular legal services that scale with your matter.
services.ctaSubtitle: Describe your situation — we'll route you to the right next step.
services.phasesSubtitle: Each phase ends in a decision point so you control spend and direction.
services.phase1Desc: Confidential conversation, document review, and scope alignment.
services.phase2Desc: Options, costs, and likely timelines documented before any commitment.
services.phase3Desc: Drafting, filings, hearings — with status updates you can audit.
services.phase4Desc: Final order, advisory note, and a clear next-step roadmap.

litigation.title: Litigation & defense
litigation.desc: Pleadings, evidence strategy, and court appearances aligned to your risk appetite.
litigation.long: We represent clients in writ petitions, civil and criminal litigation, and appellate matters with disciplined narrative-building and evidentiary focus.

advisory.title: Advisory & opinions
advisory.desc: Written opinions and structured guidance for transactions and pre-dispute planning.
advisory.long: Structured legal opinions, transactional reviews, and risk memoranda that map your decisions to the law and likely outcomes.

filing.title: Filing & registry
filing.desc: Motion practice, review petitions, and registry-facing documentation done right the first time.
filing.long: Registry-grade documentation, motion practice, and review petitions — drafted and filed to withstand scrutiny.

compliance.title: Compliance
compliance.desc: Process audits and guardrails to reduce enforcement exposure over time.
compliance.long: Compliance reviews and governance frameworks for SMEs and growing businesses, aligned to evolving regulatory expectations.

settlements.title: Settlements
settlements.desc: Negotiation and settlement framing when exit beats escalation.
settlements.long: Structured negotiation, settlement deeds, and decree-friendly framing when resolution is the smarter play.

urgent.title: Urgent applications
urgent.desc: Triage and rapid drafting when the clock is your adversary.
urgent.long: Emergency injunctions, stays, and urgent motions drafted with the speed and rigour the moment demands.

focus.title: Focus areas
focus.subtitle: Concentrated expertise across the matters that most often define our clients' risk, reputation, and recovery.
focus.civilP1: We map claims and defenses with commercial realism — not just legal theory.
focus.civilP2: Our drafting and filings aim for leverage early, to avoid protracted war unless necessary.
focus.appellateP1: We structure appeals and applications with a judge-first narrative and tight evidentiary focus.
focus.appellateP2: Oral and written work is reviewed for clarity, precedent alignment, and operational execution.
focus.ctaTitle: Tell us the constraint — we'll outline the path
focus.ctaSubtitle: A short intake conversation helps us assess urgency, forum, and likely timelines.
focus.applyTitle: See how this applies to your matter
focus.applySubtitle: We can usually give initial orientation within one business day of your inquiry.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Strategy-first counsel with responsive, documented representation at the Allahabad High Court.
about.storyTitle: Built for the way Indian clients actually work today
about.storyP1: Shivam Mishra & Associates was founded with one belief — that legal counsel should be as responsive, transparent, and modern as the people it serves.
about.storyP2: Over the past eight years we have represented entrepreneurs, families, and institutions across the Allahabad High Court and district courts — combining disciplined courtroom advocacy with WhatsApp-era communication.
about.value1Desc: We speak plainly, even on complex matters.
about.value2Desc: Your matter stays inside a small, accountable team.
about.value3Desc: Filings, hearings, and updates — on time, every time.
about.value4Desc: Legal problems are also human problems. We treat them that way.

internship.title: Career & internship
internship.subtitle: Hands-on experience in research, drafting, and court-facing preparation — built around mentorship and real briefs.
internship.programmeDesc: We believe in nurturing the next generation of legal professionals. Our internship is designed to be a rich, hands-on learning experience while aligning with our commitment to mentoring and legal education.
internship.scopeIntro: Interns are exposed to a broad range of practical tasks, including:
internship.scope2: Drafting research memoranda and case notes
internship.scope4: Assisting with case preparation and transactional matters
internship.lookForIntro: We welcome applications from law students who demonstrate:
internship.lookFor2: A willingness to learn and a professional attitude
internship.lookFor4: High levels of motivation and enthusiasm
internship.durationP1: To keep each internship meaningful and focused, we offer a limited number of places per 4-week term. All applications are reviewed carefully by our team.
internship.durationP2: We look forward to mentoring individuals who are ready to grow in a real-world legal environment.
internship.faq1A: We offer a limited number of positions for a focused 4-week term. Applications are reviewed by our team to match availability and interest.
internship.faq2A: Terms such as stipend or academic credit depend on the intake cycle. Please mention your expectations in your application and we will discuss during shortlisting.
internship.faq3A: Law students in recognised programmes who are committed to professional conduct and can commit to the schedule. Final-year students and motivated juniors are all welcome to apply.
internship.faq4Q: What kinds of work will I see?
internship.faq4A: We handle civil and criminal matters, family and matrimonial disputes, maintenance, and complex litigation before High Court and lower courts.
internship.faq5Q: Can I book a call before applying?
internship.faq5A: Yes. You can reach us through the contact page to discuss timelines, or include specific questions in your statement of interest.
internship.faq6A: We aim to respond within a reasonable time after each review cycle. If you need an update on a pending application, write to us with your name and date of submission.

form.title: Apply online
form.subtitle: We review applications on a rolling basis.
form.name: Your name
form.statementHint: Year of study, institution, availability, and what you hope to learn…
form.successDesc: Thank you. We will review your details and get back to you if there is a suitable opening.
